flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Community College of Vermont fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (16.2% → 12.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Community College of Vermont fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4k → 2.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community College of Vermont fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
